data.title: Sprouts Farmers Market opens first store in New York at Centereach, Long Island, expanding their reach.
data.description: Sprouts Farmers Market has established its initial store in New York, located in Centereach on Long Island. This marks the company's foray into the state, expanding its reach to a broader audience. The store's opening signifies a milestone for Sprouts, as it now serves customers in this region. This move showcases the company's commitment to growth and expansion, providing access to its products and services to more individuals. The debut store in New York signifies a significant accomplishment for Sprouts Farmers Market.

data.description: In Wilmington, Delaware on January 30, 2026, Brand Engagement Network, Inc. (referred to as BEN) disclosed that they have received $818,302.70 in cash from warrant exercises. BEN, listed on the Nasdaq as BNAI, specializes in offering secure artificial intelligence solutions for businesses. This substantial cash influx from warrant exercises marks a significant financial development for the company.

data.title: ArcBest reports Q4 2025 revenue of $972.7M, down from $1.0B in 2024. Net loss $8.1M, compared to $29.0M profit in 2024.
data.description: ArcBest, a prominent player in supply chain logistics, shared its financial performance for Q4 and full year ending December 31, 2025. The revenue for Q4 2025 stood at $972.7 million, a slight decrease from $1.0 billion in the same period last year. However, the net loss from continuing operations was $8.1 million, equivalent to $0.36 per diluted share, as opposed to a net income of $29.0 million, or $1.24 per diluted share, in Q4 2024. The company has not disclosed further details from the announcement.

data.title: Dorian LPG Ltd. declares $0.70/share cash dividend, returns $29.9M to shareholders, and announces Q3 earnings call date.
data.description: Dorian LPG Ltd., a prominent owner and operator of modern and ECO very large gas carriers (VLGCs), declared an unconventional cash dividend of $0.70 per share of the Company's common stock. This move will return around $29.9 million of capital to shareholders. The company will also release a news update on Thursday, February 5, 2026, before the market opens, revealing its financial results.

data.title: Seadrill extends contract for West Saturn drillship with Equinor Brasil Energia Ltda, adding $114 million to backlog.
data.description: In Hamilton, Bermuda, Seadrill Limited (NYSE: SDRL) has confirmed that Equinor Brasil Energia Ltda has chosen to exercise a one-year priced option for the ultra-deepwater drillship West Saturn. This decision has contributed an additional $114 million to the contract backlog and extended the original contract, which began in 2022, until October 2027. Seadrill's President and CEO, Simon Johnson, expressed satisfaction, stating that this extends the contract into its sixth consecutive year.

data.title: NinjaTrader expands into Europe, launching in Netherlands and Germany to support retail futures traders; plans to expand across EU.
data.description: In light of significant expansion prospects and surging demand, a prominent provider of retail futures and trading technology has initiated operations in the Netherlands and Germany, with intentions to broaden its reach to encompass the entirety of the EU. This move by NinjaTrader Group, a key player in the retail futures trading sector, comes as a response to swift growth and increasing market requirements. On January 30, 2026, the company unveiled its ambitious plans to penetrate the European market, fostering its global presence and catering to the escalating demands of investors in the region.
Overall voting privileges amounted to 100 million.
